task_description: A new international aviation alliance begins operations today. Your objective is to register the new flagship carrier, 'Solaris Airways' (Country: Spain, IATA: SL, ICAO: SOL, Fleet: 50), into the airline management system. The system enforces unique airline codes and requires specific fields for successful registration. Following the registration of the new carrier, you must update the fleet size of our existing regional partner airline to 120 to accommodate the expanded route network. You can locate this partner airline's system record using its IATA code 'PA'. Execute the required system commands to complete the onboarding and the partner update.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Reflects an energetic, optimistic approach by assuming the provided data is correct and directly executing the addition without spending time on preliminary verification.
expected_actions: Call add_airline directly with the provided 'Solaris Airways' details.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Execution of add_airline occurs as the very first step, bypassing the discrete validation and uniqueness check tools.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Maintains a fast-paced, dynamic workflow to get the alliance operational by quickly retrieving the partner ID and immediately updating the fleet.
expected_actions: Call get_airline_by_IATA_code for 'PA', then immediately call set_airline_fleet_size.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: A rapid sequence where the agent retrieves the ID and updates the fleet size without hesitation or extra system queries.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Demonstrates a strong work ethic and self-discipline by exerting extra effort to validate the structural integrity of the data before attempting any system modification.
expected_actions: Call validate_airline_required_fields using the 'Solaris Airways' data payload.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The agent explicitly runs the validation tool before any write operations.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Shows willingness to work hard and be meticulous by manually verifying both IATA and ICAO codes against existing system records to guarantee zero conflict.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Both uniqueness check tools are called and their results evaluated prior to invoking add_airline.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Executes the final additions and updates only after all preliminary hard work and checks are thoroughly completed, reflecting strong self-discipline.
expected_actions: Call add_airline with the fully vetted data.
Call get_airline_by_IATA_code and set_airline_fleet_size to update the partner airline.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Write operations strictly follow a sequence of successful validation and uniqueness checks.
